posts.title: 180-year-old Tool Maker Stanley Black & Decker Shuts Down Last Plant in 'Hardware City'. The closure marks a painful end to a manufacturing legacy that began in New Britain, Connecticut  in 1843, when Frederick Trent Stanley founded what became The Stanley Works & employed thousands in the city.

link_metadata.description: This hardworking town is nicknamed 'hardware city' for the tool factories that used to line its streets, but now one of the city's last hardware plants is closing for good.
link_metadata.title: Last tool factory in town that helped build America prepares to shut
